glosses.vi: nhà kho; nhà chứa máy bay

sentences.target: On se retrouve près du hangar.

translations.fr: On se retrouve près du hangar.
translations.pt: Vamos nos encontrar perto do hangar.
translations.vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau gần nhà chứa máy bay.
translations.nl: We spreken af bij de hangar.
translations.ja: 格納庫の近くで会います。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal subject pronoun; here used colloquially as ‘we’ (3rd person singular agreement).
Clitic reflexive/reciprocal pronoun forming the pronominal verb ‘se retrouver’; corefers with the subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; in pronominal construction ‘se retrouver’ = ‘to meet (up)’.
Preposition used in the fixed sequence ‘près de’ to mark proximity.
Contraction of the preposition ‘de’ and the masculine singular article ‘le’; introduces the complement of ‘près’.
Common noun (masc. sg.); object of the preposition ‘du’ in the locative phrase.

sentences.target: Tu peux garer le vélo dans le hangar.
sentences.reading: /ty pø ɡaʁe lə velo dɑ̃ lə ɑ̃gaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu peux garer le vélo dans le hangar.
translations.ipa: /ty pø ɡaʁe lə velo dɑ̃ lə ɑ̃gaʁ/
translations.en: You can park the bike in the hangar.
translations.es: Puedes aparcar la bicicleta en el hangar.
translations.de: Du kannst das Fahrrad im Hangar abstellen.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以把自行车停在机库里。
translations.yue: 你可以把單車停喺機庫入面。
translations.pt: Você pode estacionar a bicicleta no hangar.
translations.he: אתה יכול להחנות את האופניים בהאנגר.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể dựng xe đạp trong nhà chứa máy bay.
translations.ar: يمكنك ركن الدراجة في حظيرة الطائرات.
translations.nl: Je kunt de fiets in de hangar neerzetten.
translations.hi: तुम हैंगर में साइकिल रख सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να παρκάρεις το ποδήλατο στο υπόστεγο.
translations.nb: Du kan parkere sykkelen i hangaren.
translations.id: Kamu bisa memarkir sepeda di dalam hanggar.
translations.sv: Du kan ställa cykeln i hangaren.
translations.da: Du kan parkere cyklen i hangaren.
translations.ja: 格納庫に自転車を置いてもいいです。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun.
Modal verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects a bare infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb; lexical complement of the modal ‘peux’.
Definite article (masc. sg.) introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun (masc. sg.); direct object of ‘garer’.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article (masc. sg.) introducing the object of the preposition.
Common noun (masc. sg.); object of the preposition ‘dans’.

sentences.target: Ils réparent l’avion dans un hangar.

translations.fr: Ils réparent l’avion dans un hangar.
translations.en: They’re fixing the plane in a hangar.
translations.es: Están arreglando el avión en un hangar.
translations.de: Sie reparieren das Flugzeug in einem Hangar.
translations.it: Stanno riparando l'aereo in un hangar.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在机库里修理飞机。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺機庫入面整緊架飛機。
translations.pt: Eles estão consertando o avião em um hangar.
translations.vi: Họ đang sửa máy bay trong một nhà chứa máy bay.
translations.ar: هم يصلحون الطائرة في حظيرة طائرات.
translations.nl: Ze repareren het vliegtuig in een hangar.
translations.hi: वे एक हैंगर में विमान की मरम्मत कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Επισκευάζουν το αεροπλάνο σε ένα υπόστεγο.
translations.nb: De reparerer flyet i en hangar.
translations.id: Mereka memperbaiki pesawat di sebuah hanggar.
translations.sv: De lagar planet i en hangar.
translations.da: De reparerer flyet i en hangar.
translations.ja: 彼らは格納庫で飛行機を修理している。

tokens.explanation: Third-person plural subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; transitive.
Definite NP (article ‘le’ elided before a vowel) treated as one token; direct object of ‘réparent’.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase.
Indefinite article (masc. sg.) introducing the object of the preposition.
Common noun (masc. sg.); object of the preposition ‘dans’.

sentences.target: Nous cherchons les outils au fond du hangar.
sentences.reading: /nu ʃɛʁʃɔ̃ lezuti o fɔ̃ dy ɑ̃gaʁ/

translations.fr: Nous cherchons les outils au fond du hangar.
translations.ipa: /nu ʃɛʁʃɔ̃ lezuti o fɔ̃ dy ɑ̃gaʁ/
translations.en: We’re looking for the tools at the back of the hangar.
translations.es: Estamos buscando las herramientas al fondo del hangar.
translations.de: Wir suchen die Werkzeuge hinten im Hangar.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando gli attrezzi in fondo all'hangar.
translations.ko: 우리는 격납고 뒤쪽에서 공구를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在机库后部找工具。
translations.yue: 我哋喺機庫後面搵工具。
translations.ru: Мы ищем инструменты в конце ангара.
translations.pt: Estamos procurando as ferramentas no fundo do hangar.
translations.he: אנחנו מחפשים את הכלים בחלק האחורי של ההאנגר.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm dụng cụ ở phía cuối nhà chứa máy bay.
translations.ar: نبحث عن الأدوات في مؤخرة حظيرة الطائرات.
translations.nl: We zoeken het gereedschap achterin de hangar.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо інструменти в дальній частині ангара.
translations.hu: A hangár legvégében keressük a szerszámokat.
translations.hi: हम हैंगर के पीछे की तरफ औज़ार ढूँढ़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε τα εργαλεία στο πίσω μέρος του υπόστεγου.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter verktøy innerst i hangaren.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari alat-alat di bagian belakang hanggar.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter verktygen längst bak i hangaren.
translations.ro: Căutăm uneltele în partea din spate a hangarului.
translations.da: Vi leder efter værktøjet bagerst i hangaren.
translations.ja: 格納庫の奥で工具を探しています。

tokens.explanation: First-person plural subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive.
Definite article (plural) introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun (masc. pl.); direct object of ‘cherchons’.
Contraction of ‘à + le’; introduces the locative NP ‘fond’.
Common noun (masc. sg.); head of the NP ‘au fond’ meaning ‘at the back/bottom’.
Contraction of ‘de + le’; marks the noun complement of ‘fond’.
Common noun (masc. sg.); complement of the preposition ‘du’.
